description: Route the canonical bolt, bubble, maintenance buttons, and control panel through additive dam-mechanism wrappers

replacements.old:
<OBJECT CONTROL-PANEL
	(IN DAM-ROOM)
	(SYNONYM PANEL)
	(ADJECTIVE CONTROL)
	(DESC "control panel")
	(FLAGS NDESCBIT)>
replacements.new:
<OBJECT CONTROL-PANEL
	(IN DAM-ROOM)
	(SYNONYM PANEL)
	(ADJECTIVE CONTROL)
	(DESC "control panel")
	(FLAGS NDESCBIT)
	(ACTION DAM-MECH-PANEL-F)>
